历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 24956 → 30557 → 29715 → 42593 → 42525. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking shifted back by about 5600 places, slightly recovered in 2023, and significantly shifted back by about 12878 places in 2024. In 2025, it was basically the same as 2024 (only a slight decrease of 68 places). In the past two years, the ranking has stabilized around 42500, with a baseline of about 42525 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province was 34 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 32 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 38, an expansion of about 18.75% compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, and according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, it will push the minimum admission ranking number larger (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 107th, with recent rankings stable in the 103–109 range, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level. The school has no obvious negative or positive events in reputation files. Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 180,000, indicating relatively low exposure among 211 universities. There are no records of admission interruptions in the admission anomaly files, and overall public opinion is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the school has no A- or above level disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly at B+ level (such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.). The discipline strength is at a medium level among 211 universities, with limited additional appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (the school's flagship major) has a social popularity of 'highly recommended', Electronics/Communication is 'highly recommended', Computer Science is 'recommended', and popular engineering majors are generally hot. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72.85%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 379,548, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (260,587). The substantial expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition and push up the minimum admission ranking. The main campus of Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin City. Although it is affiliated with Hebei Province, it is located in a municipality directly under the central government. For candidates in Jiangsu Province, this is an inter-provincial application. The school's enrollment scale in Jiangsu Province is small (over 30 people), lo.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 42525, the 2026 expansion of about 18.75% (pushing to about 47309 according to the main value of supply-demand elasticity), the significant increase of about 45.7% in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province intensifying competition, the stable school level and reputation, and the lack of obvious A+ level appeal in advantageous disciplines, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is predicted. The predicted minimum ranking is about 47509, with a range of 47009–48009.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 47509, with a range of 47009–48009. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Electronics, AI) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<47009) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. Candidates close to the lower limit of the range (about 48009) are advised to focus on Tier 3 majors and carefully choose Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 5951 → 6329 → 7315 → 7575 → 8106, showing a year-by-year backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2155 positions over the past 5 years, averaging about 430 positions per year; the 2025 baseline is about 8106 positions; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province was 3 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 2, unchanged from 2025, with a very small enrollment scale (only 2), and the unchanged plan has no direct pushing or pulling effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science ranking approximately 107th, stable level; reputation stable, Douyin popularity average, no significant negative public opinion or record of score gaps; no A- or above disciplines, and the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese International Education, English) lack corresponding strong disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors are Chinese International Education and English, both with social popularity rated as 'generally wait-and-see' (foreign language majors are relatively cold); in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, estimated at about 27.15% of the total, is approximately 141,452, an increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (97,088), and the significant increase in examinee numbers will intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase of about 45.7% in History Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 8106. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 8186, with a range of 7686–8686.
